name: ryandesigns-site
description: Modern static portfolio for Ryan Designs, showcasing AI tools, automation projects, creator analytics, and GitHub work.

scripts.test: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const html=fs.readFileSync('index.html','utf8'); const checks=['HyperLiquid AI Perp Trader','Remote Role Agent','TokSignal Creator Analyzer','projectSearch']; for (const item of checks) { if (!html.includes(item)) { throw new Error('Missing expected content: '+item); } } console.log('Static portfolio tests passed');"
scripts.build: node -e "const fs=require('fs'); const path=require('path'); fs.rmSync('dist',{recursive:true,force:true}); fs.mkdirSync('dist',{recursive:true}); fs.copyFileSync('index.html',path.join('dist','index.html')); if (fs.existsSync('_redirects')) fs.copyFileSync('_redirects',path.join('dist','_redirects')); console.log('Static site built successfully into dist');"

author: Ryan Berkeley
